reviews.review_title: If I had 12 chess sets how many chees...
reviews.review_description:
If I had 12 chess sets how many cheese burgers would I have? Well given the circumstances of your life and your obesity problem (how much could you eat in one sitting) and the fact you got so hungry you caused the bite of 87 (where supposedly one of the animatronics bit out a guys frontal lobe) the exact amount of cheese burgers is 7.002

Signed - TimmyRizz

In conclusion, don't let this review discouage you from playing this game, but i do wish that they fix this problem in the future.

reviews.review_title: The portal to a new dimension.
reviews.review_description:
Day one: I’ve found it, the place that’s been all over the news. I’m glad I’m the one who gets to see what it’s all about. It was 3 weeks ago when they found this place. It was in an alleyway, a portal to a new dimension was sitting, In the alleyway. It was closed off ever since an homeless man found out about it, but now me and 3 of my co-workers are here, we are here to find out what hides beyond the portal. We were sent here by the government. He wants us to answer everything. What is this portal? Where does it lead to? How did it get here? So many questions to be answered. And now it’s finally time. We are here, we can finally find out what hides beyond the portal. 

Day two: the government and FBI has given us our gear, equipment, and safety measures. It’s about time. Tomorrow will be the day, i need a nights rest. If you couldn’t tell I’m excited about seeing what hides in that portal, I’m a very adventurous man. Might be the reason the government gave me the role to find any secrets, clues, mysteries. Anything like that. And I’m honoured. I’m so excited I don’t think I can sleep tonight. I’m literally entering a new world tomorrow. Can’t wait.

Day three: It’s time. It’s actually here. Wow. Today at 8:45. We will be entering into the portal. I’m getting ready right now, at 5:50, I have to be there by 6:30, we have to put our gear and equipment on and get everything set up for this big day. Okay we are officially here now. We have all of our gear and we are ready to enter the portal.

Day three (In portal): This is insane. We got sucked in insanely fast. It felt like a crazy water slide, except there was no water, just the air flowing me. I wouldn’t tell what I was seeing going through t the portal, I just saw bright, bright colours, and before we knew it we made it into. The. New. Dimension. We were all exhausted from the preparing, entering and all those things. It was around 9:20, it was still pretty early so we decided to give the dimension a look before we set up the tents to sleep. Now that I think about it. It doesn’t look like we can go back out of here. The portal is gone. I’m not gonna worry to much this is what I’ve been wating on for so long. This place is kinda disappointing. I expected more. But it kinda just looks like a building. An empty building. I’m thinking if this is literally just a joke. It feels unreal tho. Like the place never ends. Now it’s about 11:34. I guess it’s time to set up our tents to rest here for now. Nothing found so far.

Day four: we have exited our tents and we started to search around the huge place, everywhere we went if felt like we were just repeating the same room over and over again. But I knew we weren’t. It’s like this place never ends, we brought food here to last us at least 3 months, same with water and other needs. After a few hours of searching we basically found nothing. The only thing we have is a weird screeching sound from far in the distance. We have no idea what it was. But we decided to stop here for now and have a quick meal before setting up our tents again to rest. We made a plan while eating, we would separate, we each brought walkie talkies and if we all separated we could find something quicker. I have a bad feeling about this though.

Day five coming soon…
